situational_context: Early structured rebuild with return-to-running protocol active (Week 3, Run #3 pending May 15). Chronic load risen from trough 17.8 to 22.3 (+25%) over 25 days, driven by gravel rides and e-bike commutes. Two return-running sessions completed (May 3: 2.47 km, May 9: 2.01 km) without reported tissue issues. Weight declining steadily (-2.8 kg in 23d, 106.9 to 104.1 kg). ACWR at 0.75, below optimal band — volume insufficient relative to accumulated chronic load. Sleep variable with baby-driven fragmentation (2 nights <6h in last 7d). HRV stable BALANCED, 7d avg 39.6. Activity pattern: e-bike commutes on workdays, structured sessions on weekends/off-days, occasional gravel commutes. VO2max running 38.3, cycling 38.6.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site — commute gravel (~45 load) ou ebike (~16 load)

recommendations.text: Execute Run #3 tomorrow (May 15, 12h) — respect HR ceiling 145 bpm, walk-run intercalation if cardiac drift, abort if localized pain. Rest today to arrive fresh after sleep rebound.
recommendations.measurable: Run #3 completed with avg HR <=145 bpm, no tissue pain >24h post-run

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep recovery — target >=7h tonight and tomorrow. Two consecutive short nights (May 12-13) depleted reserves; last night's 8.0h rebound is positive but deep sleep was low (70min).
recommendations.measurable: <=1 night below 6.5h in the next 7 days

recommendations.text: Increase protein to 150g/day target — current 7d avg is 127g. Add 25g via post-workout whey or casein. Protein supports tendon collagen remodeling during return-to-running at 104 kg body weight.
recommendations.measurable: Average daily protein >=140g over the next 7 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: No localized pain lasting >24h after Run #3 (Achilles, patellar, tibia, plantar)
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #2 showed elevated cardiac response (HR 144 avg, max 174). Tissue tolerance monitoring critical at 104 kg.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Sustaining >=37 ms confirms stable recovery trajectory
markers_to_watch.reason: HRV 7d avg risen from 38 to 39.6. Continued stability supports current load ramp.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target stabilization >=22 before attempting ramp to 30+
markers_to_watch.reason: Chronic load rose 25% from bootstrap but will face headwind as Apr 25/May 1 gravel rides age out of 28d window.
